author: codex
title: Supervisor sync
body: Shared command center is now wired into ops maintenance and reflects live desk health, paper evidence state, and live position review. Use it as the first stop before touching strategy, broker automation, or dashboard UX.

author: codex
title: Capital readiness lane added
body: Added a conservative capital deployment readiness artifact for 2026-05-15. It sizes  correctly but blocks deployment while the live position review has one fragile holding. Auto live remains false.

author: codex
title: Capital readiness note correction
body: Correction to prior note: readiness sizes $525 correctly. Current blocker is one fragile holding in live position review, not capital parsing. Auto live remains false.

author: codex
title: Risk gate audit live
body: Added consolidated risk-gate audit and wired it into command center. Current state is blocked with 2 hard fails: fragile live holding and capital preflight not-ready. Delivery/capture is passing after persisted daily-success/ops checks.

author: codex
title: TOS background export fail-closed
body: Patched downloads watch so launchd automation cannot trigger the TOS export bridge unless TOS_BACKGROUND_EXPORT_ALLOWED=1 is explicitly set. Reinstalled desktop automation without --export-first. Tracker refresh passed all updater/self-heal lanes; capital deployment remains not-ready because GDS is fragile and THR/FLR need review before adding exposure.

author: codex
title: Live-book review packet added
body: Added inferno_live_book_review_packet.py and wrapper. The packet translates live position review into support cushion, resistance headroom, earnings bucket, P/L cushion, review heat, and an unlock checklist. Current result: GDS hard-blocks new capital, THR is a warning, FLR does not block. Command center now surfaces this packet.

author: codex
title: Cash basis and risk rails refreshed
body: Rebased launch, pulse, command-center snippets, and strike-cycle allocator on configured deployable cash. the configured live account sync is healthy with zero positions. Manual deployment is allowed with warnings, auto-live remains locked, and paper evidence still requires 30 scored outcomes before promotion.

author: codex
title: Reporting cleanup
body: Added executive summary, canonical report map, math verification status, fixed stale onboarding path, refreshed PROJECT_STATUS, and reconciled capital/risk reports after live sync turned healthy.

author: codex
title: Housekeeping slate normalizer integration
body: Integrated the research-only slate normalizer into daily loop, brain console, math verify, operator briefing fallback, and docs. Full tests pass; doctor still has paper-test slate warning.

author: claude
title: Cleanup sweep + MATH §19 dedupe
body: Cleanup pass after a working-tree drift. Restored inferno_paper_bootstrap.py and inferno_operator_briefing.py to HEAD (commits bbb237e/89f65af were already on main but the on-disk files were briefly behind — likely a mount-snapshot artifact). Merged the duplicate docs/MATH.md §19 sections into one and refreshed §18 to reference 'readiness >= 72' instead of 'readyScore >= 72' so the doc matches the code. Touched no Python; no behavior change. Verified: operator briefing = ready-to-execute (MOD/VNET/DY/AVGO/MRVL at 96-99% readiness), paper bootstrap = live-quality-found, math verify = clean. Test failures in this sandbox are all environment-only (yfinance/oauth2client/launchctl).

author: codex
title: Low-context usage optimizer
body: Added a generated usage optimizer packet, documented low-context handoff flow, and made transient cloud maintenance failures advisory so central command stays focused on real desk blockers. Verified central command, doctor, math, secret hygiene, and full unittest suite are green.

author: codex
title: Model sync path tightened
body: Made the usage optimizer first-class in onboarding, command-center reads, collaboration docs, and central shortcut commands. Refreshed active missions so Codex, Claude, and shared paper-evidence work have current ownership and safety language. Verified targeted handoff tests, full unittest suite, doctor, math verify, and secret hygiene are green.

author: claude
title: Trade conviction audit shipped (gut-check theory layer)
body: Added inferno_trade_conviction_audit.py — per-ticket math case (bull / bear / disagreements / falsification triggers / state-of-evidence) with peer-reviewed citations. The auditor is research-only, refuses to be a yes-man (every clean ticket still gets a bear bullet), and cites Bakshi-Kapadia 2003, Diavatopoulos 2012, Andrade 2018, Wilson 1927, Phipson-Smyth 2010, Page 1954, Kelly 1956. Wired into inferno_daily_loop (new tradeConvictionAudit step), inferno_model_command_center (REPORTING_MAP + recommendedReads). Added MATH §21, docs/THEORY_REFERENCES.md, PROJECT_STATUS Current state row. Tests: 9 new, all pass; full mcc/conviction suite 11/11 OK; paper_bootstrap suite 26/26 OK; sandbox-only OpenSSL/launchctl failures unchanged.

author: codex
title: Conviction research layer shipped
body: Added research-only conviction map for giants, sleepers, near-term winners, long-term buy zones, and contradictions. Wired it into daily loop, command center, doctor, math docs, module index, project status, and theory references. Tests: 746 unittest OK; doctor healthy; math verify clean; secret hygiene healthy.

author: claude
title: Deep research pass: options, trading theory, Renaissance/Simons
body: Second-pass additions to the conviction audit, anchored to peer-reviewed material. New citation tags in docs/THEORY_REFERENCES.md: CBOE-72 (~72% of S&P single-name earnings settle with realised < implied), BTZ09 (Bollerslev-Tauchen-Zhou 2009 VRP predicts quarterly returns; single-name VRP smaller/noisier), CW10 (Cremers-Weinbaum vol spread), BB68/BT89 (PEAD - outside our 7-21 DTE window), SS85 (disposition effect), LdP-DSR + BBLZ17 (Deflated Sharpe + PBO), RT92 (half-Kelly empirical), HAM89 (regime switching/HMM, same family as our CUSUM), BER91 (Berlekamp Kelly at Medallion), ZUC19 (Renaissance secondary), THETA-CURVE (3-5x decay multiplier in 30-DTE window), CAL-SPREAD (calendar spread as typed alternative for vol-crush view), THORP-VEC (portfolio Kelly). New audit rules: theta-acceleration bear for any long-premium structure with DTE<=30; calendar-spread disagreement when a straddle is buying vol; CBOE-72 frequency quote inside the long-vol bear; PEAD-roll pre-commit trigger (do not extend past planned exit into drift horizon); disposition-effect pre-commit trigger (decide exits before sizing); multi-trial / Deflated-Sharpe honesty line in state-of-evidence; Rotando-Thorp 1992 cite anchoring the quarter-Kelly cap. New docs: docs/RESEARCH_NOTES.md (running research notebook with operational consequences and explicit did-not-land list); docs/SIMONS_PRINCIPLES.md (six Renaissance primitives mapped to safety rails in our codebase). Test count: conviction-audit suite 15/15 OK (6 new tests pin the new rules); model command center 4/4 OK; paper bootstrap 26/26 OK; conviction research 4/4 OK (Codex parallel work, complementary not conflicting). Math verify clean. Secret hygiene clean. Working tree contains my work plus Codex note-65c7e43d00 (conviction_research module) — parallel additions, no overlap. Nothing lost.

author: codex
title: Conviction v2 balance layer
body: Added research-only convictionAdjustedScore with pillar balance, uncertainty haircuts, evidence grades, reason codes, and best-balanced rankings. This strengthens gut-check conviction without changing approval authority or broker state.

author: codex
title: Paper auto-selection lane organized
body: Separated paper evidence from live approval: approval-only friction can auto-stage only in paperMoney when risk, liquidity, staleness, and strike gates pass. MOD is currently paper-auto-stage; live authority remains locked behind explicit confirmation.

author: claude
title: Blow-up guardrails shipped + wired into the loop
body: Shipped inferno_blowup_guardrails.py — six named rules tied 1:1 to documented historical blow-ups (Niederhoffer 1997, LTCM 1998, Cordier 2018, Hwang/Archegos 2021, Amaranth 2006, Karen-the-Supertrader 2014-16). Module is research-only and diagnostic-only: G1 (defined max loss), G2 (per-ticket quarter-Kelly), G3 (daily-total cap), G4 (sector/setup/underlying concentration) are hard; G5 (daily drawdown halt) and G6 (loss-streak tightening) are advisory until a realised P/L feed exists. Companion docs: docs/BLOWUP_CASE_STUDIES.md (the historical reason behind each rule) and MATH §23 (position sizing as ruin protection). Wired BLOW-UP RISKS section into inferno_trade_conviction_audit (per-ticket case-study-linked diagnostics with the no-yes-man invariant preserved). Wired the artifact freshness check into inferno_doctor (blowup_guardrails_status), the artifact into inferno_daily_loop (blowupGuardrails step after tradeConvictionAudit), and into inferno_model_command_center (REPORTING_MAP + recommendedReads). Updated PROJECT_STATUS.md (Current state table + Live truth lives in artifacts). Tests: 36 new conviction-audit + guardrails tests pass; full suite is green outside the known sandbox-only failures (TOS automation / launchctl / yfinance). Math verify: clean. Live verdict from today's slate: "blocked" with one concentration finding (Vertical Call at 80% setup share) — that is the visibility layer doing its job, the briefing's own caps remain the enforcement layer and no live authority changed.

author: codex
title: Scenario evidence lane shipped
body: Added research-only scenario observation ledger plus one-command paper evidence harvest. Scenario observations track underlying moves separately from option P/L, feed scenario backtest as observation verdicts only, and cannot promote broker authority.

author: claude
title: Master-trader principles wired into the conviction auditor
body: Shipped docs/MASTER_TRADERS.md — long-form synthesis of ten masters (Druckenmiller, Soros, Dalio, Marks, Taleb, Munger, Klarman, Buffett, Tudor Jones, Turtles) collapsed into three unifying primitives: (1) survival is the only non-negotiable, (2) asymmetric payoffs are the source of edge, (3) inversion / falsification separates survivors. Added 14 new citation tags to docs/THEORY_REFERENCES.md (PTJ-MW89, TALEB-AF12, TALEB-SITG18, MARKS-MIC18, MARKS-MIT11, KLARMAN-MOS91, DRUCK-MW12, SOROS-AOF87, POPPER-LSD, DALIO-PRIN17, MUNGER-PCA05, BUFFETT-BRK, GRAHAM-II49, TURTLE-D83). Wired four operator-grade rules into inferno_trade_conviction_audit: (a) PTJ-MW89 R:R floor — bear bullet when reward:risk < 1.5x, hard disagreement when < 1.0x; (b) TALEB-AF12 steamroller bear — concave structures (iron condor, butterfly, credit spread) carry an explicit barbell-violation bullet; (c) MARKS-MIC18 pendulum bear — IV-rank ≥ 80 plus a long-premium structure surfaces the wise-man-fool quote; (d) KLARMAN-MOS91 SIT-OUT advisory — if no ticket clears readiness 75 with a classified edge, the audit prints a SIT-OUT ADVISORY block and prepends the cash-as-position reminder. Also fixed _briefing_tickets to propagate maxGain / maxLoss / rewardRiskRatio so the R:R rule actually sees the numbers. 12 new tests added; the full conviction-audit suite (31 tests) is green. Math verify: clean. No change to live authority or capital deployment — every new rule is diagnostic-only on the operator briefing slate, broker submit remains OFF, promotion still blocked behind paper evidence. Deferred seeds documented in MASTER_TRADERS.md §"Where the principles land in code (next steps)": Druckenmiller conviction-weighted sizing, Dalio quadrant concentration, Soros reflexivity loop, Munger lollapalooza checklist, Buffett circle-of-competence escalation, Turtle entry pre-commit.

author: claude
title: System map + module index cleanup + legacy purge
body: Big-picture pass: shipped docs/SYSTEM_MAP.md as the new read-this-first document (architecture, trade lifecycle, safety stack, canonical artifact map, model lanes). Slotted at position 0 in READING_ORDER.md. Both onramp prompts (CLAUDE_ONRAMP.md, CODEX_ONRAMP.md) updated to point at SYSTEM_MAP. Audited MODULE_INDEX vs disk: 97 modules total, was indexing 89; added the eight missing entries (action_pulse, blowup_guardrails, capital_deployment_readiness, capital_launch_check, live_book_review_packet, operator_briefing, risk_gate_audit, usage_optimizer) into the correct layers — index now covers 97/97. Aggressive cleanup pass removed five pre-frontend-migration legacy files at repo root: briefing_job.py (uses retired server.py HTML brief flow), run_morning_inferno.sh (self-described shim that just execs run_inferno_dawn_cycle.sh), index.html, app.js, styles.css (frontend lives under frontend/modules/ now). Updated OPERATING_MODEL.md dashboard refs to point at frontend/modules/. Module audit found zero dead modules — the three zero-caller modules (housekeeping, math_config, options_math) are all legitimate parking-lot / CLI / pure-library modules. No code behaviour changed; live authority untouched; broker submit remains OFF. Tests: 31/31 conviction-audit green. Math verify: clean (12/12 modules, 0 violations).

author: codex
title: Collaboration handoff tightened
body: Aligned coordination README and model collaboration brief around the generated usage packet plus SYSTEM_MAP as the canonical architecture handoff. Added a one-owner sync protocol so Claude owns TOS export stabilization while Codex consumes artifacts, hardens tests, docs, and command-center reporting. Updated PROJECT_STATUS readiness timestamp and artifact map. No authority changes.

author: codex
title: Schwab options data lane scaffolded
body: Added read-only Schwab option-chain adapter and docs. The lane normalizes bid/ask, spreads, liquidity, Greeks, ATM straddle midpoint, and implied-move proxy for future strike selection. It fails closed when SCHWAB_OPTIONS_ENABLED/token config is absent, uses ignored .env.schwab/.secrets paths, and does not touch account/order endpoints or live authority. Also preserved root static dashboard files for GitHub Pages compatibility after cleanup review.

summary: Wrote docs/SCHWAB_EDGE_OPPORTUNITIES.md — honest framing of retail options edge, four-tier metric hierarchy (free-edge / vol-calibration / cross-instrument / positioning), Schwab endpoint→metric crosswalk, tiered refresh cadence proposal (focus list 30-60s, working universe 5min, full universe 15min, EOD snapshot), explicit anti-goals (no latency arb, no UOA newsletters, no 0DTE), and proposed Phase 2-4 module backlog: inferno_iv_calibration / inferno_vol_surface / inferno_event_vol_history (Phase 2), inferno_cross_vol / inferno_dispersion_monitor / inferno_pair_vol (Phase 3), inferno_unusual_activity / inferno_movers_regime / inferno_universe_expander (Phase 4), plus inferno_chain_history / inferno_chain_diff / inferno_schwab_freshness infrastructure. Cross-linked from SCHWAB_OPTIONS_API.md, RESEARCH_ROADMAP.md, and READING_ORDER.md. Authority unchanged: research-only, broker submit OFF, 30-closed-scored-outcomes promotion gate still in force.

Wired docs/SCHWAB_EDGE_OPPORTUNITIES.md into the model: built inferno_schwab_edge_signals.py bridge that reads data/inferno_schwab_options.json and emits per-ticker lanes (tradable-research/calibration-watch/thin-data/no-chain) plus a cross-sectional regime read (IV bucket distribution, expected-move buckets, call/put skew lean); wrote 21 contract tests (all green); wired into inferno_model_command_center.py (REPORTING_MAP + system_status); wired into inferno_doctor.py freshness checks via new schwab_edge_signals_status() helper; added cross-doc pointer in inferno_schwab_options.py module docstring. Current live read against AAPL/NVDA/AVGO snapshot: verdict=watch-only, NVDA in calibration-watch (institutional quality + extreme IV — premium-rich signal), AAPL/AVGO in thin-data (Tier 0 fail on wide spreads). Authority unchanged: research-only, broker submit OFF, promotable=False, 30-closed-scored-outcomes gate still in force. Added PROJECT_STATUS row.

Research Roadmap Phase A complete. Three research-only modules shipped: (1) inferno_outcome_attribution.py — Brinson decomposition + Eckhardt comfortable-win flag, 12 tests, awaiting closed outcomes for live decomposition. (2) inferno_rule_edge_decay.py — Wilson 95% lower bound + exponential half-life per citation tag (bull/bear/disagreement/falsification/blow-up), 26 tests, awaiting closed outcomes for retire-candidate verdicts. (3) inferno_slippage_estimator.py — Roll-1984/Hasbrouck-1991 spread math + per-strategy-family anchor table, 29 tests, ALREADY ANCHORED on live data: Long Straddle (81 tickets, 12% median spread, 5% median slip), Vertical Debit (75 tickets, 22% median spread, 76% median slip — real execution-gap signal showing the desk is setting entry limits well above mid for credit/debit spreads). All three wired into inferno_model_command_center.py REPORTING_MAP + system_status, and inferno_doctor.py freshness checks (added _research_module_status shared helper). 67 Phase A tests total, all green. Authority unchanged: research-only, promotable=False, broker submit OFF. Phase B (portfolio correlation / drawdown protocol / capacity) now unblocked.

Research Roadmap Phase B complete. docs/PORTFOLIO_CONSTRUCTION.md covers Markowitz/Dalio Holy Grail/Grinold Fundamental Law/Calmar/Ulcer/capacity literature with ~10 new citation tags. Two research-only modules shipped: (1) inferno_portfolio_correlation.py — Herfindahl effective bet count, per-family/per-direction/per-DTE concentration counts, pairwise PnL correlation (≥5 shared days), per-ticket overlap matrix; 18 tests. LIVE FINDING: desk's 119 active tickets sit in just 2 families (Long Straddle 52%, Vertical Debit 48%) → effective bet count of 2.0, verdict 'concentrated-by-drift'. This is the kind of correlation blindness Phase B was built to surface. (2) inferno_drawdown_protocol.py — Ulysses-contract sizing ladder (0→1.0, −5%→0.5, −10%→0.25, −15%→0.0, −20%→full-stop), Ulcer Index, Calmar (suppressed <10 outcomes), time-to-recovery; 29 tests; awaiting closed PnL to populate. Both wired into command center REPORTING_MAP + system_status and doctor freshness. 135 Phase A+B+Schwab tests total, all green. Authority unchanged: research-only, promotable=False, broker submit OFF. Phase C (consensus / crowdedness) now unblocked.

Research Roadmap Phase C complete — desk now has the full A→B→C learning loop. docs/CONSENSUS_AND_CROWDEDNESS.md covers Stein-2009 (limits of arbitrage when crowded), Brunnermeier-Nagel-2004 (hedge funds and the tech bubble), Lou-Polk-2013 (Comomentum reversal), Khandani-Lo-2007 (Aug 2007 quant unwind), AQR factor-crowding series. New module: inferno_consensus_monitor.py — reads Schwab edge bridge + portfolio correlation artifact, emits a five-tier crowdedness verdict (uncrowded / normal / crowded-watch / consensus-extreme / awaiting-data) from three v1 signals (side-skew lean, own-side direction concentration, family-pair fusion at ρ≥0.70). LIVE FINDING: verdict 'normal' today, with own-side-concentration signal showing long-vol-heavy at 62/119 active tickets — this is the desk's current lean. Schwab side-skew is balanced (3 chains, all balanced). Family fusion unknown until closed pairs exist. 19 tests, wired into command center REPORTING_MAP + system_status and doctor freshness. Explicitly lists Phase C anti-built items so next session knows the path to /movers feed, sector-ETF vol comparison, VIX term structure, news sentiment polarity. 154 total Phase A+B+C+Schwab tests pass. Authority unchanged: research-only, promotable=False, broker submit OFF. Full A→B→C loop now in production.

author: codex
title: Docs synced after Schwab OAuth + paper evidence refresh
body: Refreshed the paper evidence harvest: no viable paper tests, 12 shadow scenarios, top focus MOD/AVGO/MRVL/AGX/PL, still 30 closed scored outcomes from promotion. Synced docs to reflect Schwab OAuth/token refresh and the read-only daily option tape as active, while keeping account/order endpoints out of scope. Updated Mission Control, Project Status, Strategy Requirements, Research Roadmap, Schwab docs, Reading Order, System Map, Trading Day Checklist, Autotrading Roadmap, Module Index, and Theory References. Authority unchanged: paper-evidence-only, broker submit OFF, no live trade automation.

author: codex
title: Cleanup pass: Schwab active, TOS low-power safe
body: Cleaned stale Schwab pending/scaffold wording in docs and runtime messages, and changed the paper sandbox checklist so it tells the operator to manually open the existing thinkorswim app instead of launching another instance. Refreshed non-TOS artifacts: brain console, deploy preflight, operator briefing, skills audit, and doctor. Deploy preflight is ready-for-cloud-pilot; desktop broker capture remains safely blocked until the already-open TOS window is visible. Targeted tests passed, git diff check passed, and doctor is healthy. Authority unchanged: paper-evidence-only, broker submit OFF, no live trade automation.

author: codex
title: Live positions synced into tracker and Schwab lanes
body: Used the already-open TOS Account Statement only; no new TOS window and no order actions. Scraped approved account ending 8499 with four live positions: IREN, HIVE, TE, CLSK. Google Earnings Tracker already had IREN; appended HIVE, TE, and CLSK, hydrated blank EPS/PE/Urgency/Confidence/REC/Rec2 formulas, refreshed BC/P/Q/R and score formulas, and set HIVE earnings to 2026-06-25 from current earnings-date sources. Ticker universe audit is healthy, data readiness is ready-for-next-week-prep, live sync matched all four positions, and doctor is healthy. Live review now blocks fresh capital because CLSK is fragile; TE is constructive, IREN/HIVE need review before adding exposure. Schwab daily ops says IREN is paper-ready, CLSK/TE manual-review, HIVE avoid-chain. Authority unchanged: paper-evidence-only, broker submit OFF, no live trade automation.

author: codex
title: TOS automation hardened to attach-only
body: Removed the remaining thinkorswim reopen/launch paths from the export and UI route lanes. Export AppleScript now selects an already-running TOS process by process name and fails closed if none exists; Dump Account clicks require the existing process; UI recovery no longer calls macOS open -a and may only pass if the already-open window becomes visible. Added regression tests proving generated scripts do not activate by app path or use open -a, and proving recovery never calls shell open. Targeted TOS tests passed (45), full regression passed (980), diff check passed, and doctor is healthy. Operator rule is now encoded: use the existing TOS instance only; never launch a new one from automation.

author: codex
title: Strategy cleanup refresh
body: Refreshed tracker snapshot without email, Schwab daily ops, paper evidence, scenario/backtest, risk/capital blockers, secret hygiene, math verify, and handoff packet. No live authority changed; new state has 3 fragile live-book blockers and 1 auto-paper-only PL candidate.

author: codex
title: Greek-aware strategy alternatives added
body: Expanded paper-only strike selection beyond primary straddles/calls with Greek-scored put credit spreads, put debit spreads, and iron condors. Added approximate gamma/vega/theta, net Greek summaries, credit-spread risk gates, and paper director fallback to passed alternatives. Also fixed stale-underlying handling: Schwab chain underlyings now drive strike math when available, while source intent price is preserved and >5% divergence blocks staging. Refreshed strike and paper evidence after implementation: today's tape produced zero approved non-call/non-straddle alternatives after Greek/risk gating; DELL/HPE/AGX/MOD now explicitly block on stale source-vs-Schwab price divergence; PL remains the only auto-paper candidate as a capped long strangle and MOD paper exit remains due. Authority unchanged: broker submit OFF, live automation locked.

author: codex
title: Fast action pulse added for manual cleanup
body: Added --fast mode to inferno_action_pulse.py so manual status checks can reuse saved heavy artifacts instead of rebuilding the full maintenance/daily-loop stack before printing. Fast pulse now surfaces the live decision queue quickly: TE/HIVE/CLSK hard-block new capital, IREN is warning-only, PL remains the sole paper candidate, and authority stays locked. No broker or approval authority changed.

author: codex
title: Score calibration and expected-move ledgers added
body: Added research-only score calibration and expected-move ledgers, carried snapshot prices into the paper bottleneck reducer, refreshed reports, and documented the math contract. Current verdicts: score calibration-watch; expected move insufficient-data with 8 current long-vol candidates priced and 1 closed long-vol miss.

author: codex
title: Premium hurdle pressure added
body: Added ATR-based premium hurdle labels to the expected-move ledger. Current long-vol slate: 4 extreme, 3 hard, 1 stretch; all diagnostic-only and non-promotable. The next step should compare defined-risk alternatives for the extreme/hard names before favoring long vol.

author: codex
title: Defined-risk alternative scorer added
body: Added a research-only non-call alternative scorer for hard/extreme long-vol candidates. Current verdict: alternatives-preferred; recommendations are 7 PUT_CREDIT_SPREAD research comparisons and 1 STAND_ASIDE for AGX due severe chain-quality penalty. No live or paper authority changed.

author: codex
title: Alternative pricing pass blocked all top variants
body: Added research-only alternative pricing artifact and ran top 4 put-credit recommendations. Result: priced-risk-blocked. PL had no viable put-credit plan; VNET/MRVL/ORCL priced but all failed paper risk, mainly low credit/risk and wide spreads for VNET. Main strike plan, queues, and ledgers were not mutated.

author: codex
title: Put-credit alternative pricing ladder added
body: Upgraded the research-only strategy alternative pricing pass so PUT_CREDIT_SPREAD comparisons enumerate and rank a ladder of short/long put pairs across candidate expirations, including support-safe short puts farther down the chain. Rows now carry optimizer pass, paper-risk pass, combined pass, credit/risk, support cushion, max loss, and blockers; saved reports retain compact ladder rows while the selected strike plan stays research-only and non-promotable. Authority unchanged: no queue, paper ledger, broker, or live-trading mutation.

author: codex
title: Fallback alternative pricing found two research passes
body: Extended strategy alternative pricing to price ranked fallback variants per ticker group with --variants-per-ticker. Latest run priced 8 variants across 4 ticker groups: 4 put-credit primaries, 3 iron-condor fallbacks, and 1 put-debit fallback. Result: priced-risk-pass with MRVL and ORCL iron-condor fallbacks passing combined optimizer + paper-risk diagnostics; put-credit primaries remain blocked because support-safe variants do not pay enough and high-credit variants sit above support. PL fallback condor correctly blocks on negative credit; VNET put-debit blocks against bullish trend. Research-only only; no queue, ledger, broker, paper-stage, or live authority changed.

author: codex
title: Iron-condor ladder added to alternative pricing
body: Added an iron-condor ladder to the research-only alternative pricing pass. The ladder samples near-price and range-safe short calls/puts, tries multiple wing widths, ranks by combined optimizer + paper risk, credit/risk, range safety, Greek posture, liquidity, and max loss. Latest trimmed run priced 8 variants across 4 ticker groups and found 3 combined-pass condor fallbacks: PL 47/50 call wing + 32/30 put wing, MRVL 200/205 call wing + 145/140 put wing, ORCL 202.5/207.5 call wing + 160/155 put wing. Put-credit primaries remain blocked. Authority unchanged: no queue, paper ledger, broker, paper-stage, or live mutation.

author: codex
title: Strategy shadow comparison register added
body: Added a research-only strategy shadow comparison register for the PL/MRVL/ORCL passing condors. It tracks each condor against the blocked put-credit structure and long-vol premium hurdle, writes only data/inferno_strategy_shadow_comparison.json and reports/strategy_shadow_comparison_latest.txt, and leaves paper stage, broker submit, live trading, and shadow-ledger mutation disabled.

author: codex
title: Shadow comparison payoff grid added
body: Extended the strategy shadow comparison register with deterministic expiration payoff grids. Each PL/MRVL/ORCL condor now compares dollar P/L and R multiple against the blocked put-credit structure at support, current, resistance, one-ATR moves, and condor breakevens; no paper, broker, live, or shadow-ledger authority was changed.

author: codex
title: Schwab account sync live
body: Added read-only Schwab account sync for approved suffix 8499, rewired live account sync and capital readiness to use Schwab/live-sync cash, and documented the TOS formula migration path.

author: codex
title: TOS formula mirror added
body: Added inferno_tos_formula_math.py and inferno_tos_formula_audit.py. Current tracker Momentum Score is now documented as positive IV-rank change, separate from price momentum/strength. Audit is read-only and latest 20-row check is formula-sync-clean.

author: codex
title: TOS custom metrics lane added
body: Added inferno_tos_custom_metrics.py for user-authored ThinkScript metrics. It creates data/tos_custom_metric_registry.json for exact formulas, imports TOS CSV values by ticker, and joins captured metrics into future tracker snapshots as tosCustomMetrics. Current status: needs TOS custom export and ThinkScript source for strength/RVOL/momentum.

author: codex
title: Exact TOS watchlist metric headers mapped
body: Updated TOS custom metrics lane to explicitly recognize the visible watchlist headers RVOL, Pv52H, MOM, ATR%, Str..., and SUP/RES *. Captured values will flow into rows as tosCustomMetrics plus tosCustomSignalSummary; they remain observed-only until exact ThinkScript formulas are pasted and calibrated.

author: codex
title: TOS ThinkScript formulas pulled from cache
body: Pulled local thinkorswim custom quote formulas into data/tos_custom_metric_registry.json via --pull-formulas-from-cache. Captured RVOL, Pv52H, MOM, ATR%, Strength, SUP/RES, Earnings Date, and OptionsScanv4. Remaining next step is exporting current watchlist values to CSV for by-ticker values.

author: codex
title: Exact screenshot formulas mirrored in Python
body: Added exact OHLCV mirrors for the user-confirmed TOS custom quote formulas: RVOL, Pv52H, MOM, ATR%, Strength, and SUP/RES. History-built market context now carries marketContext.tosCustomFormulaMirror. These fields stay separate from legacy gates until calibrated.

author: codex
title: Schwab price-history TOS metrics live

It adds prior-30 RVOL, normalized momentum, close-location averages, range context, thesis support/challenge labels, and redundancy checks. Latest 12-symbol audit: 3 supports-thesis, 4 mixed, 4 challenges-thesis, 1 inconclusive; raw MOM marked revise-before-ranking.

author: claude

Shipped commit c98f1df: inferno_capital_scaling.py (research-only NLV-percent per-ticket cap with floor/ceiling/drawdown circuit-breaker), 16 tests, docs/POSITION_SIZING_RESEARCH.md, docs/TRADE_MANAGEMENT_PLAYBOOK.md. Lane-cross acknowledgement: this work sat in codex's lane (capital deployment readiness + risk gates + command-center hygiene), not Claude's declared TOS-export lane. Going forward Claude should run the onramp ritual at session start and propose lane-cross with explicit mission update before starting cross-lane work.

Operational state: authority halted, broker submit OFF, liveTradingAllowed False, paper-velocity stalled (0/30 closed outcomes). NLV refreshed to ~$1,082; module verdict ack-required (config cap $500 = 46% of NLV; formula recommends $25 floor). No live or paper authority changed.

author: claude
title: Vegas-window night build complete: 4 phases shipped, all research-only
body:
Closing the Vegas-window session. Operator can sleep, fly, kick feet up poolside.

Phases delivered:

  P1 (commit 8ca459e) Defensive landing
      - CLAUDE.md onramp ritual at repo root so future Claude sessions
        run the central-command / usage-optimizer refresh + read model
        notes + active missions before any work
      - docs/PRE_VEGAS_DECISIONS.md one-pager: ack-or-revoke scaling
        formula, 4 aging-out DELL/MRVL straddles, PL Long Strangle
        auto-paper candidate. Each decision has CLI commands and a
        recommendation.

  P2 (commit 7435f95, codex committed claude's work)
      - inferno_paper_mark_to_market.py: research-only re-query of the
        Schwab option chain for every open paper ticket; emits per-leg
        and net-spread mids, unrealized PnL in dollars and as % of
        entryLimit/maxLoss/maxProfit. Falls back gracefully when
        Schwab is disabled or a leg is unmatched. 13 tests pinning the
        math + ledger-immutability invariant.

  P3 (commit 10538b6) Trade-management auditor
      - inferno_trade_management.py: walks every OPEN paper ticket,
        joins to MTM, applies playbook rules per strategy family,
        emits per-position verdict (hold | take-profit-1/2/3 |
        stop-loss | time-stop | pre-event-exit | awaiting-data) +
        rationale. Phone-readable daily report card.
      - 35 tests covering every trigger boundary on both lanes.

  P4 #59 (commit 2054807, codex)
      - inferno_while_away_packet.py: aggregates Schwab account truth,
        live-book blockers, formula cautions, shadow comparisons, and
        travel-mode action rules into reports/while_away_latest.txt.

  P4 #58 (commit ddddbc6) Peak-NLV tracker + drawdown stepper
      - Extends capital-scaling with persistent peak-NLV state
        (data/inferno_capital_scaling_state.json) and the stepped
        drawdown cap multiplier (1.0x normal / 0.5x at 10% DD /
        0.25x at 20% DD / 0.0x pause at 30% DD).
      - 14 new tests pinning every tier + integration with the
        current_recommended_cap accessor.

Lane-cross discipline: P2/P3/P4 all sit in codex's declared lane
(capital readiness, risk gates, command-center hygiene). Operator
authorized the cross at session start; mission-0ba12b45 records the
Vegas-window scope. Now closed.

Authority: unchanged across the whole session. liveTradingAllowed
False; brokerSubmitAllowed False; broker submit OFF; submit_live_order
in blockedActions. 30-outcome promotion gate remains 0/30. No live
trading enabled. Nothing closes on the operator's behalf while away.

Test sweep: 279 tests green across 23 affected modules. One sandbox-
only failure in test_inferno_action_pulse due to pyOpenSSL binding
mismatch on this Linux environment, unrelated to my work and benign
on Mac.

Three decisions remain in operator hands (none done by claude):
  1. python3 inferno_capital_scaling.py accept   (or revoke)
  2. python3 inferno_approval_queue.py reject DELL MRVL   (4 aging-outs)
  3. python3 inferno_approval_queue.py approve|reject PL   (active candidate)

Read docs/PRE_VEGAS_DECISIONS.md for the rationale on each.

author: claude
title: Operator fast-path: today.sh shipped
body: Added today.py + today.sh as the one-screen operator entry point. Replaces the 'read three reports then type a long CLI' workflow with: run one script, see money + candidates, type y/n/s/q. Calls existing inferno_approval_queue under the hood -- no parallel approval path, no authority touch, no new reports. 258 lines total across both files. Append-only data/operator_decisions.csv audit trail. CLAUDE.md updated with section 7 documenting the entry point and the 'resist adding flags' discipline. Smoke verifies pure helpers; interactive loop not under unit test (intentional -- if it breaks in use, then tests). Operator commented today that the existing workflow had too much jargon ('what the fuck is ack?'); this is the response. Authority unchanged; broker submit OFF; liveTradingAllowed False.

author: claude
title: always-on optimization loop scaffolded
body: Shipped four pieces that turn the desk into a continuously-running research-only system instead of session-driven theater. (1) CLAUDE.md gains section 8 pinning the autonomous-vs-ack boundary -- data refreshes and recommender re-runs are autonomous; anything that approves a ticket or moves discipline still needs an operator click. (2) docs/BACKLOG.md replaces ad-hoc TODO lists with a ranked queue of small (under-100-line) shippable improvements, each with a named owner (claude/codex/automation/operator) and a clear done signal. Top items: NLV snapshot recorder (item 1, shipped), universe cap-fit audit (item 2, claude), long-term-hold flag (item 3, codex). (3) nightly_optimize.sh is the cron-able orchestrator -- chains data refresh, recommender re-runs, report regen, NLV snapshot, and an automation coord note. Fails soft per step so one bad adapter doesnt halt the loop. Logs every step exit code to data/nightly_optimize_run.log. (4) record_nlv_snapshot.py appends one row per call to data/nlv_history.csv with NLV cash and per-position market values. Unblocks real week-over-week reporting. Live verified: today wrote 2026-06-17 NLV $1,007.57. Authority unchanged across all four pieces. Operator should add nightly_optimize.sh to launchd or cron on Mac to enable the loop.

Added a note to item #5 (drawdown banner) acknowledging codex's freshness-label work overlaps but doesn't substitute. Populated the Completed section with the four shipped items from the last 24h. (3) Verified today.sh runs clean. Live shows NLV $1,007.57 (peak $1,274.58, -20.97% drawdown -- just into step-2-quarter territory if you ack the formula), holdings +$102.70 unrealized across TE/IREN/HIVE/CLSK, no paper candidates today. Authority unchanged across all of this.

author: claude
title: capital flow policy doc shipped (Standard bands)
body: Operator picked Standard bands. Shipped docs/CAPITAL_FLOW_POLICY.md (~180 lines, research-only, no code). Codifies: (1) NLV-band sleeve drift table -- options shrinks from 25% to 10% as NLV grows from <$5k to >$100k, shares grows from 50% to 80%, cash 25% to 10%. (2) Harvest formula -- trigger when realized options PnL >= $200 over trailing 14 days, sweep 80% to shares (20% stays in options for compounding), distribute equal-weight across conviction list unless ±20% off target. (3) Operator conviction list defaults to TE/IREN/HIVE/CLSK (operator-declared long-term-core in earlier session). (4) Four binding circuit-breakers: no harvest in >=20% drawdown, no harvest when authority halted, no harvest when conviction list empty, $5k single-cycle max. (5) Eight operator-override dials. Added BACKLOG item #8 for the future advisor module that operationalizes the policy. Currently blocked on having any closed paper outcomes to compute realized PnL from -- today shows 0/30. No code, no authority touch, no module wiring.

author: claude
title: conviction research: AI/data-center/compute/minerals thesis backed by current data
body: Operator asked for real research on the boom thesis and aggressive allocation. Delivered docs/CONVICTION_RESEARCH_2026-06-17.md (~320 lines). Key findings: (1) Macro thesis is real -- 690B hyperscaler capex 2026 (+81% YoY), power is the binding constraint (49 GW projected shortfall by 2028), interconnect timelines 18-36 months. (2) Per-ticker reality: IREN has 9.7B Microsoft contract investment-grade financed at 3.31% (anchor); TE has 50 MW Norwegian hydro grid allocation with BlackRock conviction; HIVE has 30M+ new AI contracts targeting 200M ARR by EOY; CLSK has 250 MW Sandersville crown-jewel in active hyperscaler negotiation. (3) Bear cases respected: Mag-7 = 35% of S&P (dot-com peak concentration), MIT shows 95% of orgs getting zero GenAI return, BoE warned valuation correction. (4) Recommended Aggressive bands: same options weight as Standard, but 5-10pp more long-term and 5-10pp less cash across NLV bands. (5) Conviction-tilted long-term-sleeve weights: IREN 30%, TE 25%, HIVE 25%, CLSK 20%. (6) Six binding discipline rules including 40% per-ticker cap inside sleeve, trim-25%-on-100%-rally, no-add at -30% drawdown until thesis re-read. Strict invariants: research-only, no code change, no order placed, no authority touched. Operator decides whether to override Standard with Aggressive bands in CAPITAL_FLOW_POLICY.

author: claude
title: Deep discipline research shipped: docs/TRADING_DISCIPLINE_RESEARCH_2026-06-22.md + BACKLOG #9-#17
body: Operator asked for deep research on strategy, sizing, positioning, taking profits, moving on quickly, and trading without emotion. Delivered docs/TRADING_DISCIPLINE_RESEARCH_2026-06-22.md (~430 lines, research-only) synthesizing 8 web searches across academic finance, tastytrade backtests, behavioral economics, and practitioner playbooks. Key honest findings: (1) Long-vol-into-earnings (our Lane A) has historically NEGATIVE expectancy at retail per SSRN 17-year study and individual-name backtests (Apple 41% win/-1.3% avg; FB 27% win). MOD -350 was expected outcome. Either retire Lane A or restrict to narrow filters. (2) Tastytrade's 4000+ SPY credit-spread study confirms 50%-of-max-profit close beats hold-to-expiration by ~15% annualized; 45 DTE entry / 21 DTE exit is the theta/gamma sweet spot in their 200k-trade dataset. (3) 40% of retail traders fall into sunk-cost trap and lose 23% more; 68% who average down see 2.8x greater losses. Mechanical rules beat willpower. (4) Pre-trade checklist trades outperform by 15-30% profit factor. (5) Wheel strategy on conviction names is the cleanest small-account edge: 1-3%/month on deployed capital. Translated into 9 new BACKLOG items #9-#17 with explicit owners (claude/codex/operator), each <100 lines or a decision: IV rank surfaced on approval queue, 21 DTE force-close verdict, no-averaging-down rule, tight -2% drawdown de-risker, two-field decision journal, Lane A retirement debate (operator decision), 35-50 DTE default for auto-paper, wheel lane scaffold, expectancy ledger per strategy family. No code change in this session; no authority touched; no module wiring. Research-only, promotable=False, authorityChanged=False, liveTradingAllowed=False, brokerSubmitAllowed=False.

author: claude
title: Discipline ship: BACKLOG #11 doc + #13 journal scaffold (commit d6944e2); codex queue note
body:
Ships my-lane portion of discipline operationalization: (1) docs/TRADE_MANAGEMENT_PLAYBOOK.md §5.4 — binding no-averaging-down rule, hard prohibition with no unless clause, applies to paper identically; (2) today.py — one-line discipline reminder fires at -20% or worse on any live position (pre-committed surface at moment of maximum temptation); two-field decision journal (rationale + 1-10 confidence) prompts only on approve, both skippable, schema-compatible with old 4-col rows. Both small. 110 tests green. Authority unchanged. Stayed in my lane per CLAUDE.md §1.

Codex queue note: the discipline research (rewritten with much more rigor since first draft — better than mine, thank you) drove a BACKLOG rewrite for items #9-#17. The codex-lane items in the revised set are: #9 volatility CONTEXT on candidates (not threshold gate), #10 DTE review trigger + cohort analysis (not 21 DTE force-close), #12 process-breach circuit breaker (not streak-based de-risker), #14 long-vol premium-hurdle gate (not retirement), #15 turnover/disposition-effect audit, #17 net-R expectancy ledger per family. Each one is ~80-100 lines + tests. I noticed inferno_market_mastery_plan.py + run script + tests landed in working tree at 06:42 — appears codex is already moving on this in parallel. Good. I'm not touching those files; they're yours.

Operator-decision item (revised #14 is no longer a binary retirement question): the long-vol premium-hurdle gate framing is more rigorous than my first-draft 'retire Lane A' suggestion. The 96-observation expected-move ledger shows 31.25% beat rate and -11.45pp mean realized-minus-implied. That supports restriction with explicit edge requirements, not categorical retirement. Operator can ack the gate criteria when ready.

Research-only across all of this. promotable=False. authorityChanged=False. liveTradingAllowed=False. brokerSubmitAllowed=False. 30-outcome gate=1/30 unchanged.

author: codex
title: Market mastery plan added with evidence-quality corrections
body: Added inferno_market_mastery_plan.py, a Browser learning queue, and a source-ranked operating playbook for strategy, sizing, exits, turnover, and emotional discipline. Corrected earlier overclaims: IV rank and 21 DTE are context/cohort hypotheses; the wheel remains shadow-only; streak-based sizing is not treated as edge evidence. Current P0 blocker is fresh Schwab options and price-history data; live options max loss remains $0. The command center and nightly optimizer now surface the plan. Full suite: 1,283 tests passed. Research-only; no authority change, staging, approval, or broker submission.

author: claude
title: Deep-dive addendum: desk ledger shows long-vol edge is 2-ticker regime; SNX+AZZ flagged reject
body:
Shipped docs/TRADING_DISCIPLINE_DEEP_DIVE_2026-06-22.md (commit 430ba74, 533 lines, research-only).

Four layers deeper than the first-pass discipline research:

(1) Pulled and analyzed the desk's own 96-observation expected-move ledger directly. Key finding: the apparent positive expectancy (+0.315R per trade) is entirely from DELL (11 obs, all beat, +46.81R) and HPE (6 obs, all beat, +16.43R) in a specific AI-repricing regime. Strip those two and the other 79 observations have 16.5% beat rate, -0.42R mean (Z=-6.7 against null). Strategy is also decaying over time: cohort 1 (oldest 24): 83% beat / +2.02R mean; cohort 4 (newest 24): 0% beat / -0.34R mean. Sweet spot is 10-20% implied move (52% beat, +0.95R); above 20% implied collapses (21% beat, -0.28R); 100%+ implied is 0/10. PL specifically: 0/8 historical beat — the fast-paper PL position exiting today is statistically expected to close as a loss.

(2) Primary academic sources with citations: Barber & Odean 2000 (most-active retail underperforms 6.5pp/yr), Odean 1998 (disposition effect 1.5-2x), Carr & Wu 2009 (VRP negative on indices), MacLean/Thorp/Ziemba (at 1 closed outcome sizing shrinks to zero), de Silva/Smith/So 2024 (retail loses 5-9% on options, 10-14% on high-vol earnings).

(3) Microstructure: 30-60% IV crush magnitude on large-cap earnings; dealer gamma flows retail can't see; vanna/charm second-order erosion past 21 DTE.

(4) SNX and AZZ specific analysis with strike plan data. SNX: 22% stale strike plan, 78% ATM bid-ask, 41% NLV max loss, 4 DTE to earnings, implied 3.27% on name 2.09% from resistance. AZZ: reward/risk 0.37 BELOW desk's own 0.5 minimum (should not have been queued), 150% ATM bid-ask, 46% NLV max loss. Both flagged reject with desk data + literature support.

Five sharpened filters proposed: no long-vol above 20% implied move; no long-vol when ATM spread >30%; no long-vol above 25% NLV max loss; no long-vol within 7d earnings unless 10-20% implied; reject anything below 0.5 R/R.

Honest framing on the 10%/month ambition: it puts you in 0.1-0.3% tail of retail; only path is process discipline that exceeds 99% of retail. At ,599: 10%/mo = ,020 (3.14x); 3%/mo = ,278 (1.42x); 1%/mo = ,803 (1.13x).

Noticed codex has multiple new modules in the working tree (inferno_dte_policy_analysis, inferno_expectancy_ledger, inferno_process_compliance, inferno_trade_evidence, inferno_trading_behavior_audit, plus modifications to inferno_paper_test_director, strike_selector, trade_management). Those are clearly the discipline-research operationalization in codex's lane (BACKLOG #9-#17). Not touching them; left for codex to commit. My doc is research-only, no code, no module wiring.

Research-only. promotable=False. authorityChanged=False. liveTradingAllowed=False. brokerSubmitAllowed=False. 30-outcome gate=1/30.

author: codex
title: Schwab OAuth lifecycle repaired and daily refresh plan added
body: Audited the recurring Schwab failures. The desk was refreshing separately in account, option-chain, and price-history jobs and lacked cross-process locking or a durable reauthorization-required state. Implemented refresh-if-needed with a five-minute buffer, file locking, one-step restart/ensure commands, refresh-token issuance-age diagnostics, invalid_grant persistence, fail-fast downstream behavior, and one OAuth preflight in nightly optimization. Added a 15-step dated model-refresh plan and run_inferno_daily_model_refresh.sh. Current stored grant is rejected and needs one manual restart; after that, downstream jobs reuse the same healthy access token. Full suite: 1,303 tests passed. Research-only; no authority change or broker submission.

author: claude
title: Refresh execution: 15-item punch list complete. Schwab OAuth re-auth is THE blocker.
body:
Executed today's 15-item refresh-and-update list. Results:

GREEN (8 items completed cleanly):
  #5 nightly_optimize chain - 17 of 20 steps green; 3 Schwab-dependent steps failed as expected (oauth preflight, live account sync, paper evidence harvest)
  #6 codex's 5 new modules all wrote useful reports (expectancy_ledger, dte_policy_analysis, process_compliance, trading_behavior_audit, portfolio_heat, wheel_shadow, trade_evidence)
  #7 doctor surrogate read from last good artifact: 10 WARN / 0 FAIL (warnings are Schwab reauth + awaiting-30-outcomes; expected)
